creator: pgut001@cs.auckland.ac.nz
text: Now it works, boot log identical to your one.  The two things that changed were that I downloaded a more current CURRENT (20190207 -> 20190314) and that I switched from the eMMC and an 8GB Apacer microSD I had lying around to a 32GB Samsung SD because I noticed you'd used a 32GB micro SD as well.  I'll retry with the current image on the eMMC (16GB) and 8GB Apacer to try and narrow down what the magic factor was.
